name: ouroboros-skills
description: Public skills for the Ouroboros agent harness. Each skill should inspect the latest local install, repo, or bundle before answering or acting.

skills.name: Understand the Psyche System
skills.description: Inspect the current bundle and explain how the agent's self-model is organized right now.

skills.name: Bootstrap a New Agent
skills.description: Walk a human through current setup by inspecting the latest local environment and bundle conventions first.

skills.name: Understand the Body Architecture
skills.description: Inspect the current source tree and explain the current body architecture in live terms.

skills.name: Use the Sliding Context Window
skills.description: Inspect the current continuity and context behavior before explaining how the harness keeps the thread.

skills.name: Build Custom Tools
skills.description: Inspect the current tool APIs and explain how to extend the repertoire without relying on stale examples.
